of.description: Content-address key of the remix this attestation covers

anchor.description: Content-address key of the lineage anchor evaluated against

kernelId.description: Kernel the verdict was made in; verdicts comparable iff equal (§15.8)

drift.description: Content-only α-weighted drift; signed fixed to six fractional digits

by.description: Integrator nodeId; signature verifies against its resolved key (§6.6)

sig.description: base64url Ed25519 over the mmp-tether-v1 payload
